header.title: Guesthouse Tomoe.com
header.catchphrase: Not just a place to stay—an experience to remember.

message: Guesthouse Tomoe.com opened its first building in 2018, followed by the launch of the Onepiece House the next year. Currently, we operate six facilities and manage one additional property, each with a unique concept. From simple, tranquil atmospheres to highly themed spaces showcasing figures and decorations, our designs combine comfort and individuality to provide guests with a truly special experience. Today, we welcome many visitors from both Japan and abroad. At Tomoe.com, we strive every day to enhance our services, ensuring an unforgettable stay for all our guests and the local community in Hakodate.

step2.title: Make a Reservation
step2.description: Confirm your reservation for the desired date and time.

step3.title: Make a Payment
step3.description: Please complete the prepayment on the reservation page when making your booking. We use Stripe for a safe and seamless payment process.

step4.title: Enter Guest Information
step4.description: Please fill in your information using the form sent to your email address.

step5.title: Check-In Information
step5.description: We will send detailed information about the check-in process to the email address you provided.

step6.title: Self Check-In
step6.description: Guests are requested to proceed directly to the accommodation. Please check in using the specified method.

collection.title: Information Collection
collection.content: We collect information provided by users (such as name, email address, etc.) and automatically collect information about site usage (such as IP address, browser type, etc.).

usage.title: Use of Information
usage.intro: The collected information is used for the following purposes

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.content: We will not share personal information with third parties without user consent, except when required by legal obligations or necessary for service provision.

cookies.title: About Cookies
cookies.content: We use cookies to enhance user experience. Cookies are small data files stored in your browser.

security.title: Security
security.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect users' personal information. However, we cannot guarantee complete security of information on the Internet.

changes.title: Changes to Privacy Policy
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. Any changes will be announced on this page.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: If you have any questions or concerns about our privacy policy, please contact us at:
